source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
artist: Unknown photographer (LoC Miscellaneous Items in High Demand)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Aerial view of Kodiak, Alaska
description: Circa 1900 elevated panoramic photograph of Kodiak town on Kodiak Island, Alaska, showing the full sweep of the village along the harbor shoreline with houses, fishing sheds, beaches, and boats visible. Kodiak has been continuously inhabited since the Russian-American Company founded a permanent settlement here in 1792.
alt: Circa-1900 elevated black-and-white photograph of Kodiak, Alaska showing the village along the harbor with houses, beaches, and boats
